subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! In those regions call out, with complete servitude, as this servant at the threshold of the Abhá Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی در آنصفحات بعبودیت محضه اینعبد در آستان جمال ابهی ندا نما
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @personal instructions
